_comment: Harness Engineering feature index. Maintained by Claude Code; avoid large manual edits. Individual feature details live in the features/ directory (e.g. features/FEAT-001.json).

projects._comment: Register all sub-projects (frontend apps/, backend services/)

_features_note: Feature list is split into the features/ directory. Each feature is a standalone JSON file (FEAT-001.json, etc.). To read all: ls features/*.json | xargs -I {} cat {}
